name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Chicken Salmon And Zucchini 50g
description: Give your cat a tasty and light snack with Spectrum Gusto Soup featuring Chicken, Salmon, and Zucchini. This 50g wet food pouch combines 15.4% chicken, 10% salmon, and 4.7% zucchini in a savory fish broth for a flavorful, hydrating experience. Perfect as a daily reward, snack, or meal topper, it provides modest protein, minimal fat, and 90% moisture for cats needing extra hydration or a palatable treat. Key Features: Real chicken and salmon for protein and omega-3 support. Zucchini adds fiber and essential nutrients. Hydrating fish broth encourages water intake. Low-fat, light snack suitable for all cats. Pre-portioned 50g pouch for convenient feeding. Feeding Guidelines: Serve in small amounts with a spoon. Use as a treat, snack, or complementary food. Fresh water must always be available.
